future_consumption.AG39A: AG39A should be a public mutation decision checkpoint only. It must not perform public mutation or real publish without explicit operator approval.
future_consumption.AG39B: AG39B may prepare a tightly scoped controlled apply execution package only after AG39A approval.
future_consumption.AG39C: AG39C should prepare SQL/grant execution instructions only if the operator explicitly approves, and should keep service-role key out of repo/chat.
future_consumption.AG39D: AG39D should audit any approved controlled apply execution package before execution.
future_consumption.AG39Z: AG39Z should close the public mutation decision chain and either continue blocking or proceed to a separately approved execution stage.
